title: Homeless Safe Parking Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Homeless Safe Parking Programs 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CHURCH @ THE PARK SAFE PARKING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a site for legal car camping. Garbage disposal facilities and portable restrooms are available to guests. All vehicles must be in working condition. Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Parking: 7pm-7am Email (971) 375-7491 Visit Website More Details JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER SAFE PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a space for legal car camping. Vehicles must be operational with up-to-date registration. Unable to take RVs. 12264 SW Hall Boulevard Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Families and individuals experiencing homelessness and using their vehicle as their primary residence Hours: By appointment only Email (503) 624-4666 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOUNTAIN VIEW COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT SAFE PARKING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe parking facilities for community members living out of their car or a RV, and also has shower and laundry facilities. Partners with two local low-income housing complexes to provide case management support for placement into permanent housing. 1475 SW 35th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Permanent housing: age 55 and older or families with children Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 527-0028 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY EUGENE SERVICE STATION OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal camping, free garbage disposal, and portable restrooms for those living in their vehicles (tents are not allowed). Participants are hosted by faith communities, businesses, nonprofit organizations, or government offices. 450 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless and living in their vehicle (RV, trailer, motorhome, truck, car, van, or tiny house) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 689-6747 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides legal camping, free garbage disposal, and portable restrooms for those living in their vehicles (tents are not allowed). Participants are hosted by faith communities, businesses, nonprofit organizations, or government offices. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless and living in their vehicle (RV, trailer, motorhome, truck, car, van, or tiny house) Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST COMPASSION RESOURCE CENTER SAFE PARKING PROGRAM MOUNTAIN VIEW COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT SAFE PARKING ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM
